allow: Bash(node -e "const A=require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); const c=new A\({apiKey:'x'}\); console.log\('sdk version:', require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk/package.json'\).version\); console.log\('messages.create is fn:', typeof c.messages.create\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import A from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'; const c=new A\({apiKey:'x'}\); console.log\('messages.create:', typeof c.messages.create\); console.log\('messages is fn ok'\);")
